015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
022import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
023
024import java.time.Instant;
025import java.util.ArrayList;
026import java.util.List;
027
028/**
029 * Detailed information about an in-wallet transaction (from gettransaction RPC)
030 */
031public class WalletTransactionInfo {
032    private final Coin amount;
033    private final Coin fee;
034    private final int confirmations;
035    private final Sha256Hash blockhash;
036    private final int blockindex;
037    private final Instant blocktime;
038    private final Sha256Hash txid;
039    private final WalletConflictList walletconflicts;
040    private final Instant time;
041    private final Instant timereceived;
042    private final String bip125Replaceable;
043    private final DetailList details;
044    private final String hex;
045    private final RawTransactionInfo decoded;
046
047    @JsonCreator
048    public WalletTransactionInfo(@JsonProperty("amount")            Coin amount,
049                                 @JsonProperty("fee")               Coin fee,
050                                 @JsonProperty("confirmations")     int confirmations,
051                                 @JsonProperty("blockhash")         Sha256Hash blockhash,
052                                 @JsonProperty("blockindex")        int blockindex,
053                                 @JsonProperty("blocktime")         long blocktime,
054                                 @JsonProperty("txid")              Sha256Hash txid,
055                                 @JsonProperty("walletconflicts")   WalletConflictList walletconflicts,
056                                 @JsonProperty("time")              long time,
057                                 @JsonProperty("timereceived")      long timereceived,
058                                 @JsonProperty("bip125-replaceable") String bip125Replaceable,
059                                 @JsonProperty("details")           DetailList details,
060                                 @JsonProperty("hex")               String hex,
061                                 @JsonProperty("decoded")           RawTransactionInfo decoded) {
062        this.amount = amount;
063        this.fee = fee;
064        this.confirmations = confirmations;
065        this.blockhash = blockhash;
066        this.blockindex = blockindex;
067        this.blocktime = Instant.ofEpochSecond(blocktime);
068        this.txid = txid;
069        this.walletconflicts = walletconflicts;
070        this.time = Instant.ofEpochSecond(time);
071        this.timereceived = Instant.ofEpochSecond(timereceived);
072        this.bip125Replaceable = bip125Replaceable;
073        this.details = details;
074        this.hex = hex;
075        this.decoded = decoded;
076    }
077
078    public Coin getAmount() {
079        return amount;
080    }
081
082    public Coin getFee() {
083        return fee;
084    }
085
086    public int getConfirmations() {
087        return confirmations;
088    }
089
090    public Sha256Hash getBlockhash() {
091        return blockhash;
092    }
093
094    public int getBlockindex() {
095        return blockindex;
096    }
097
098    public Instant getBlocktime() {
099        return blocktime;
100    }
101
102    public Sha256Hash getTxid() {
103        return txid;
104    }
105
106    public List<Sha256Hash> getWalletconflicts() {
107        return walletconflicts;
108    }
109
110    public Instant getTime() {
111        return time;
112    }
113
114    public Instant getTimereceived() {
115        return timereceived;
116    }
117
118    public List<Detail> getDetails() {
119        return details;
120    }
121
122    public String getHex() {
123        return hex;
124    }
125
126    public RawTransactionInfo getDecoded() {
127        return decoded;
128    }
129
130    public static class WalletConflictList extends ArrayList<Sha256Hash> {
131    }
132
133    public static class DetailList extends ArrayList<Detail> {
134    }
135
136    public static class Detail {
137        private final String account;
138        private final Address address;
139        private final String category;
140        private final Coin amount;
141        private final String label;
142        private final int vout;
143        private final Coin fee;
144
145        public Detail(@JsonProperty("account")  String account,
146                      @JsonProperty("address")  Address address,
147                      @JsonProperty("category") String category,
148                      @JsonProperty("amount")   Coin amount,
149                      @JsonProperty("label")    String label,
150                      @JsonProperty("vout")     int vout,
151                      @JsonProperty("fee")      Coin fee) {
152            this.account = account;
153            this.address = address;
154            this.category = category;
155            this.amount = amount;
156            this.label = label;
157            this.vout = vout;
158            this.fee = fee;
159        }
160
161        public String getAccount() {
162            return account;
163        }
164
165        public Address getAddress() {
166            return address;
167        }
168
169        public String getCategory() {
170            return category;
171        }
172
173        public Coin getAmount() {
174            return amount;
175        }
176
177        public int getVout() {
178            return vout;
179        }
180
181        public Coin getFee() {
182            return fee;
183        }
184    }
185}
